title: cuter74-dev/wowTerminal
summary: A context-aware AI terminal with SSH, SFTP, and local/remote LLM support.

title: kirankigi5/tokentriage
summary: TokenTriage is a local-first inference routing gateway for AI agents. It sits between apps and LLM providers, classifies each request, checks security and policy rules, routes to the cheapest sufficient model tier, verifies quality when needed, and records a full cost-saving receipt. The demo shows live routing traces, analytics, architecture

title: stevenfackley/Qavren-Swarm
summary: Local MCP server that orchestrates ephemeral, hardened Docker coding agents (claude-code / local OpenAI-compatible / Anthropic) against a read-only workspace copy, returning a reviewable git diff. .NET 10, Windows + WSL2 Docker.

title: ludex-lab/ludex
summary: Assemble living AI creatures from biological organ blocks — an AI ethology research platform. Code MIT · sample creature corpus CC-BY-4.0.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: obris-dev/openmagpie
summary: Open-source, self-hostable social listening tool that surfaces the conversations that matter to you, so you can join in while they're active.

title: NeelAPatel/neo-localmcp
summary: Deterministic, hash-aware repository context for AI coding agents — bounded local-model ranking/summarization on top, never required.

title: Greenwingedtealacquirer39/local-llm
summary: Run state-of-the-art LLMs and speech-to-text models on local hardware with tested configurations and container setups.

title: Flat-enophile546/ai-agent-todo-template
summary: Build an autonomous todo application with Next.js, LangGraph, and Ollama to manage tasks through a stateful AI agent.

title: Aivyx-Agent/aivyx
summary: A local-first, self-learning personal AI agent in Rust — governed autonomy, signed identity, and a memory that's yours. Source-available (BUSL-1.1).

title: zlatko-lakisic/agentic-orchestration
summary: Model-agnostic multi-agent orchestration built on CrewAI. YAML-driven agent and MCP catalogs, dynamic LLM planning, sessions, and pluggable execution — mix Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace, and your own tools without rewriting orchestration logic.
